name: Coupang, Inc.
description: Coupang, Inc. owns and operates e-commerce platforms through its mobile applications and websites primarily in South Korea. The company operates through two segments: Product Commerce and Growth Initiatives. It sells various products and services in the categories of home goods and apparel, toys, sporting goods, electronics, and everyday consumables, as well as travel and dining merchant services. The company also offers Rocket Delivery, which provides next-day or same-day delivery of groceries and general merchandise, as well as Coupang Eats, a food delivery service, and Coupang Play, a video streaming service.
